title: Craftable Calcite Recipe
body:
# Craftable Calcite

**No More Amethyst Excavations**

Calcite looks amazing in builds — clean, smooth, and perfect for detailing. But in vanilla Minecraft? It’s locked behind geodes, buried deep underground, and surrounded by mobs. This datapack says forget the spelunking and lets you craft it like a builder should.

Note: “Calcite Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack. If you are interested in more datapacks, check out the links at the end of the description.

🧠 Why It’s Better

Because calcite shouldn’t be rarer than diamonds when you just want to decorate your base. Whether you're building a modern mansion, a fantasy temple, or just want that polished white texture, this pack puts calcite right where it belongs — in your crafting table.

**📦 How to Use**

1. Download the .zip

2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder

3. Type /reload in-game

4. Start crafting your calcite and build without limits
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
